name: Policy: New Host Discovered in DMZ
notes: Detects when a new host has been discovered on the network.
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following VIS Host Discovery.New Host Discovered, VIS Host Discovery.Bulk Host Discovered
when the local network is DMZ
TD_list: APPLY Policy: New Host Discovered in DMZ on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following VIS Host Discovery.New Host Discovered, VIS Host Discovery.Bulk Host Discovered
AND when the local network is DMZ
RED_list: Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
